name: videos-src
description: HyperFrames compositions for the DJI pitch landing. Renders MP4s into ../public/videos/.

scripts.render:hero: cd hero-loop && npx hyperframes render --resolution landscape --output ../../public/videos/hero-loop.mp4
scripts.render:reel: cd pitch-reel && npx hyperframes render --resolution portrait --output ../../public/videos/dji-pitch-reel.mp4
scripts.render:all: npm run render:hero && npm run render:reel

author: Luis Sambrano
